channel.title: Projects on Syamil Maulod
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Syamil Maulod

item.title: Sgdi Explore
item.description: This is a series of posts to document my exploration into the Singapore Government Directory.

item.title: FastParliament
item.description: A quicker way to understand parliamentary debates

item.title: Movement Tracking
item.description: This is a series of posts for an end-to-end approach in capturing movement data and working on geo-spatial visualisations
